status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Load HuggingFace datasets to disk
features.user_visible_behavior: Raw datasets (UTS_VLC, phapdien, legal_qa) saved as JSONL in data/raw/
verification: Run python src/data_collection/load_hf_datasets.py
Verify data/raw/uts_vlc/*.jsonl exists with >0 lines
Verify data/raw/phapdien/train.jsonl exists
Verify data/raw/legal_qa/train.jsonl exists
features.notes: HuggingFace SSL timeouts possible — retry if needed. Using .venv/Scripts/python.exe

features.title: Chunk legal documents by Điều level
features.user_visible_behavior: articles.jsonl in data/processed/ with correct schema (law_id, law_name, law_type, article_num, chapter, text, source)
verification: Run python src/processing/chunker.py
Verify data/processed/articles.jsonl exists
Verify each article has all required fields
Verify law_name follows format: Loại VB + Mã VB + Trích yếu
Verify at least 6 core SME laws have articles
Verify no duplicate (law_id, article_num) pairs
evidence: law_name format correct: 'Luật 59/2020/QH14 Luật Doanh nghiệp', 'Bộ luật 45/2019/QH14 Bộ luật Lao động', etc.
features.notes: Fixed UTS_VLC slug ID normalization (e.g. 'Luat-Dau-tu-so-61-2020-QH14-321051' → '61/2020/QH14'). Extended phapdien law_id extraction for TT-BCA, QĐ-TTg, TTLT-* patterns.

features.title: Build FAISS + BM25 indexes
features.user_visible_behavior: FAISS dense index and BM25 sparse index saved in indexes/
verification: Run indexing pipeline
Verify indexes/faiss/ has valid index file
Verify indexes/bm25/ has valid BM25 data
Query a sample and get results from both indexes
evidence: BM25Okapi: 2,666 docs, query 'doanh nghiệp nhỏ và vừa' returns correct articles
features.notes: CPU-only (no GPU). max_length reduced from 8192 to 512 for CPU performance (~38min vs 44h).

features.title: Hybrid retrieval with RRF fusion + reranking
features.user_visible_behavior: Given a legal question, retrieve top-10 relevant articles via dense+BM25+RRF+rerank
verification: Run hybrid retrieval on sample questions
Verify top-10 results include relevant articles
Verify RRF correctly merges dense + BM25 scores
Verify reranker improves precision over hybrid-only
evidence: 3 test queries all return correct law articles
'hỗ trợ DNNVV' → top-10 from Luật 04/2017 + NĐ 80/2021
'đăng ký doanh nghiệp' → Điều 26 Luật Doanh nghiệp (top-1)
'nghỉ thai sản' → Điều 139 Bộ luật Lao động (top-1)
Reranker correctly orders by relevance (irrelevant articles get negative scores)
features.notes: RRF k=60. Used transformers API for reranker (FlagEmbedding reranker incompatible with transformers 5.x). CPU-only.

features.title: LLM answer generation with citations
features.user_visible_behavior: Given a question + retrieved articles, generate Vietnamese legal answer with 'Theo Điều X...' citations
verification: Generate answer for sample question
Verify answer contains 'Điều X' citation patterns
Verify relevant_docs and relevant_articles fields are populated correctly
Verify law_name format matches competition requirement

features.title: End-to-end pipeline producing valid results.json
features.user_visible_behavior: Running full pipeline on test set produces results.json that passes format validation
verification: Run full pipeline on test set
Verify results.json has all required fields (id, question, answer, relevant_docs, relevant_articles)
Verify format validation passes
Verify zip submission structure is correct
